feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)

entry.title: Chimera Fox
entry.summary:
Author: sync433

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,088Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 303

Summary: While having dinner with his dad. Stiles complains about possible threat that is the Alpha pack. And how he can't find anything about them. Or how he can't find anything on how to better protect them, then what he already has.But their dinner is cut a short, when they get a call about how something strange is happening at one of Beacon Hills sub power stations. Being the closet car, they are the first to respond.What they find will change the pack and their lives forever.

entry.title: I surrender who I've been for who you are
entry.summary:
Author: ichengxhun

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,659Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 81

Summary: When Sitles is born, he has a unique and distinctive mark just below his neck. In a society where the supernatural and magic are as ordinary as breathing, the concept of soulmates should be considered just as common; the thing is, it isn’t. Soulmates are reserved for outstanding and important figures in the world—for people with so much power in the palms of their hands that someone must exist to balance and share the burden of destiny.

entry.title: a problem that doesn't want to be solved
entry.summary:
Author: wishingonalightningbolt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,463Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 263

Summary: Derek is an executive at Hale Publishing. Stiles is his assistant—his assistant who's 23 years younger than him. So Derek really shouldn't...notice him. The way that he does. -0- Stiles is attractive. Derek knows that. He’s not blind. Sometimes, not often, Derek finds himself—looking. Admiring. Stiles is tall and fit, broad shoulders that taper to a trim waist, an ass that Derek shouldn’t be checking out as often as he does, firm and high. Derek isn’t ignorant to his own fluid sexuality. He used to fuck men, back in the day, when he was twenty and single and easy. But then he was with Jennifer, and since the divorce it’s just seemed…less complicated. To date women. But he likes men—aesthetically. Sexually. He likes Stiles more than he should. And it’s weird not because he’s a man but because Derek has literally never had this problem before. He’s never been attracted to one of his assistants, ever. Then again, none of his assistants have been anything like Stiles.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: [Podfic] there’s something in the water
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: "I feel funny," Stiles says, ruining Derek's theory that his imagination was just running especially wild in ways he really tries not to think about when he isn't strictly in private.~Derek and Stiles stumble over some fuck-water hot springs.Podfic of there’s something in the water by whimsicalmeerkat.

entry.title: The Mage's Home
entry.summary:
Author: DaoOfGay

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,673Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 85

Summary: After a severe crash out and mental breakdown that resulted in him opening his soul and awakening it to his true power, Stiles is kicked out of Scott's pack by said Alpha. Years later, a much more mature and powerful Stiles receives an S.O.S message from a friend, and this time, he won't fail. Or; Stiles leaves Beacon Hills, makes his own pack, gets better, and returns to kick ass.

entry.title: Change On The Rise
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 137,123Chapters: 75/75Kudos: 87

Summary: (Teen Wolf/Stargate Crossover AU continuation)As summer draws to a close, the Littlefield pack continues their long road to recovery. Still reeling from his sister's death and resurrection, Derek returns to his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor; Cora grapples with the consequences of everything that transpired over the summer, including her return from the dead; and Stiles finds new ways to balance the desires of his inner demons with the needs of his pack.

entry.title: cotton candy
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,545Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: From the tweet:next ragebait idea: keep replying to them on different apps during an argument and:How can I get into someone else’s dream? I need to deliver a message Derek leaves the texts on read and slams his phone down with a sigh, pretty blush coloring his cheeks. It’s not that he’s embarrassed — well, maybe he is, a little, but he didn’t expect for Stiles to find out this way, thought he could keep his secret to himself for just a little longer. In which Derek gets sucked into Instagram, is forced to listen to an obnoxious Spotify playlist, gets wired exactly $6 along with a message, considers buying a stupid plushie for Stiles, has an entire conversation with him in his dream, and somehow cleans his whole loft, all while avoiding Stiles himself.

entry.title: The Secret Contract
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,827Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Shy, handsome 23-year-old Derek, the awkward son of ridiculously rich parents, has never even had a girlfriend. Worried he’s too timid and inexperienced, his parents secretly hire Stiles, a stunning slutty 30-year-old escort known for turning nervous men into confident lovers. They pay her a fortune for one rule: teach their son about flirting, desire, and sex… but never let him fall in love with her.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,896,290Chapters: 51/?Kudos: 71

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Beautiful Wreckage
entry.summary:
Author: sensingowls

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,745Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 7

Summary: Stiles hasn't been back to Beacon Hills in years, but when he senses Something is Up, he makes the decision to go back to help out. Filled with anxiety, he heads back to the trauma filled nightmare that is his hometown, ready to protect his pack, the love of his life and his son.This fic takes huge liberties with the plot of the movie, featuring Sterek who are idiots in love, a magical, BAMF Stiles, and a demon masquerading as the Nogitsune.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,401Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 167

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Divine Move
entry.summary:
Author: FailCat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,843Chapters: 11/17Kudos: 680

Summary: Stiles is dealing with trauma of the Nogitsune but is afraid that the pack won’t accept him after murdering twenty-one people while possessed by the Nogitsune. Derek changes tactics and tries to run the pack how his mother would, while also trying to get stiles to stop his self isolation from the pack.

entry.title: All Alphas Are Bastards (AAAB)
entry.summary:
Author: diecide

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,889Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 69

Summary: After Stiles gets kicked out of Kansas High School, the sheriff is forced to find a new job in Beacon Hills, California. What happens when the notorious troublemaker meets the beacon for monsters? Add in hot werewolves and family secrets, Stiles is positive the sheriff is going to disown him.

entry.title: fake smile
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,027Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: Derek’s barely spoken a word all evening, has no clue what to say or how to start his own conversation with anyone. All his friends are on the other end of the table, and the people sitting right around him are Stiles’ coworkers, or friends of friends. The only one other than Stiles that he’s interested in interacting with is the golden retriever he spots out the window. “Please, please can we leave,” he types slowly, glowering at autocorrect and his own clumsy typing. “Also maybe a Taco Bell run on the way home, they have a new menu,” he adds. Fuck it; if he’s asking to leave early, there’d better be something in it for both of them. -Or, Derek is stuck at a dinner party with Stiles, everything is awkward, and he just wants to go home.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Derek Hale
  • Stiles Stilinski
  • Humor
  • Anxiety
  • Social Anxiety
  • Established Relationship
  • POV Derek Hale
  • Crack Treated Seriously
  • Is it?? Idk
